sections.name: Officium
lines: Tertia die infra Octavam Ss. Apostolorum Petri et Pauli

sections.name: Comment
lines: In Divino Afflatu, when Pretiossisimi Sanguinis is transferred, in case of the Dies Octava Corp. Christi (e.g. 2038), the proper last gospel from the Octave of the Apostels is said on this day.

sections.name: Evangelium
sections.condition: rubrica divino et feria 5 et tempore Octava Corpus
